scripts.setup: bun install; for d in .agents .claude .codex .cursor; do [ -d "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$d" ] && mkdir -p "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH/$d" && rsync -a "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$d/." "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH/$d/"; done; for f in .env .env.example; do [ -f "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$f" ] && cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/$f" "$CONDUCTOR_WORKSPACE_PATH/$f" || true; done
